phases.name: Nominate-AI Core Infrastructure
phases.description: This project represents the foundational development and integration of the core components necessary for the Nominate-AI ecosystem. It encompasses the initial setup, data pipelines, and key modules required for processing and managing the various data sources and tools within the project, focusing on establishing a stable and scalable infrastructure.

phases.name: Nominate-AI Core Infrastructure & Development
phases.description: This project represents the foundational development phase of the Nominate-AI ecosystem, focusing on establishing the core infrastructure and initial development of the key components – maild, maild-ui, pocket, lochness, cryptid, and mog. It’s a period of intensive work on initial setup, testing, and establishing a basic operational framework for the project.

milestones.title: Conversion Documentation & Batch Processing Tool Complete

phases.name: Data Infrastructure & Core Components
phases.description: This phase focuses on establishing the foundational infrastructure for the Nominate-AI project, including the development of key components like `flock`, `larus`, `seedbed`, `clarion`, and `campainbrain`. It involves building comprehensive testing frameworks and documentation to support future development and maintenance of the system.

phases.name: Core Infrastructure & API Components
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational components of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem, including the backend API for cbapp, the core workflow engine (cbworkflow), and essential data handling infrastructure (cbpublic). It focuses on building reliable and scalable systems to support the project’s functionality.

phases.name: Core Image Processing & Analysis Components
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational components of the Nominate-AI project, focusing on essential image and video processing functionalities. It includes the initial development of `cbmodels`, `cbradio`, `cbsurveys`, `cbinfra`, `cbfiles`, and `cbdocs`, establishing the basic infrastructure for image analysis and inference. These components are crucial for the project’s core operations.

phases.name: Alpha-Phase
phases.description: This phase represents the initial development and refinement of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. It encompasses the creation of core components like cbintel, cbproject, cbauth, cbos, cbmaintain, cbtest, and cbsms, focusing on establishing a functional and stable foundation for the project. The focus is on building the fundamental building blocks for the AI-powered name suggestion system.

phases.name: Data Processing & Indexing Pipeline
phases.description: This project represents the core data processing and indexing pipeline for the Nominate-AI ecosystem. It encompasses the creation of several crucial components, including a document processing API (cbunstruct), a tunnel infrastructure (cbtor), a user guide generator (cbmobile), and a vectorless RAG document indexing system (cbindex).  Furthermore, the project includes a caching proxy (cbtails) focused on improving performance.

milestones.title: cbmobile - TypeScript 35-Commit Automated User Guide Generator
cbmobile - Campaign Brain web application guide generator
cbindex - FastAPI wrapper for PageIndex - vectorless RAG document indexing
cbtiles - CBTiles - CartoDB tile caching proxy with look-ahead prefetching

phases.name: Campaign Brain Development Pipeline
phases.description: This project represents the evolution of the Nominate-AI ecosystem, encompassing the core components necessary for building and deploying the Campaign Brain AI service. From initial campaign brain geocoding to a comprehensive suite of tools, this pipeline focuses on creating a robust and scalable infrastructure for data management, AI model deployment, and client interaction.

milestones.title: cbcli - Unified CLI for Nominate AI Services
cbcdn - Campaign Brain Self-Hosted CDN Assets
cbcore - Core Library for Campaign Brain FastAPI Services
cbscout - Agent Memory and Knowledge Management Service

phases.name: Campaign Brain Ecosystem
phases.description: This project represents the core development phase of the Nominate-AI system, encompassing the initial setup and foundational components of the campaign brain system. It involves building and testing the core modules – Campaign Brain System Manager, cbwebhook, cbissues, cbpulse, cbvpn, and cbpayments – that form the basis of the distributed monitoring and self-healing infrastructure and the various tools for managing campaign data.  The development phase focuses on establishing a robust and scalable system for analyzing and optimizing campaign performance.

milestones.title: cboverseer - Campaign Brain System Manager - Distributed monitoring and self-healing infrastructure
cbwebhook - The cbwebhook repository is a Python-based webhook ingestion service.
cbissues - The cbissues repository is an issue tracking dashboard built with Python, aiming to provide a centralized system for managing and tracking issues.
cbpulse - Campaign Brain Pulse - Real-time system health and activity monitoring dashboard
cbvpn - VPN Cluster Management API - Geographic routing through OpenWRT workers
cbpayments - The cbpayments repository is an online payment system with recent commits focused on improving documentation, adding new features, and enhancing user
cbsocial - API access layer for social media accounts

phases.name: Campaign Brain Core Development
phases.description: This project represents the foundational development of the Campaign Brain ecosystem, focusing on the core components that enable LLM agent management and data collection. It includes essential tools like the MCP server, cbnetwork for VPN/Tor network management, and the core CB Executive Summaries and Dashboard applications.  The development phase highlights the initial building blocks of the system, ensuring a stable and functional foundation for future expansion.

phases.name: Core Infrastructure & Initial Development
phases.description: This phase represents the foundational development of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem, focusing on establishing the core components and initial functionality of each repository. It began with the initial creation of CBRadio UI, followed by the addition of OpenWRT router management via MCP and FastAPI, and then the creation of templates and the campaign brain tools.  The focus is on building a basic, functional system for rate control and media buying.

milestones.title: CBRadio UI - Rural AM/FM Rate Console & Media Buying Platform
cbrouter - OpenWRT Router Management via MCP & FastAPI
cbtemplates - Campaign Brain Services Starter Project

phases.name: Core Services & Infrastructure
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational components of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. It encompasses the core services – Campaign Brain TTS, CBDC, and CBQA – and the underlying infrastructure necessary to support their operation. The development phase focuses on building and consolidating the essential systems and data structures that underpin the entire project.

milestones.title: cbtts - Campaign Brain TTS service wrapping VibeVoice-Realtime-0.5B
cbdc - Campaign Brain data center infrastructure — systemd units, SOPS scripts, health daemon, certbot hooks
cbqa - Python - Commits: feat: initial CBQA CLI with full DC1 regression results
cbairtable - Python - Multi-tenant Airtable API wrapper with DuckDB sync
cbhandbook - Python - User guides and ops handbooks for Campaign Brain services
infrastructure - Python - Campaign Brain infrastructure monorepo — consolidates infra services as submodules

phases.name: Campaign Brain Core Infrastructure
phases.description: This repository represents the foundational infrastructure and core components of the Nominate-AI project ecosystem. It encompasses the essential tools and data pipelines needed to support the AI-powered task management and scheduling tool, cbea, and its associated infrastructure standards, including the Infra Says and CB Ops dashboards. The focus is on building a robust and scalable system for data management and operational monitoring.

milestones.title: cbea - AI-powered Task Management and Scheduling Tool
cbinfrasays - Infra Says - Campaign Brain Infrastructure Standards & Updates
cbloom - Cbloom is a TypeScript-based campaign content and narrative engine focusing on responsive tile layouts and data integration.
automation-spotlight - The `automation-spotlight` repository is a monthly internal newsletter focused on automating tasks with CSS.
cbingest - This GitHub repository, developed by cbingest, is a data ingestion pipeline service focused on automating the extraction of text from Claude JSON resp

phases.name: Supply Chain Security & Operational Layer
phases.description: This repository represents the core development of the cbskills system, a centralized resource for managing Claude skills with a strong emphasis on supply chain security. It’s a foundational layer built to manage and integrate Claude’s capabilities, providing a structured environment for data management and workflow optimization. CJ’s personal operating layer, mission-control, is a supporting component focused on immediate decision-making and intelligence gathering.

Recent commits include new features for building, managing, and displaying automation workflows, including templates, stylesheets, and content. Key milestones identified are the addition of the HR document automation and the scaffolding of the project structure.

Key milestones include implementing full document extraction, adding documentation, and establishing a maintenance pass for the API.
